title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TeamLease Skills University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TeamLease Skills University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Curriculum Developer in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!
